reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the current CLI guide evaluate-fixture path claim covered by focused CLI tests and the shipped command catalog.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic evaluate-fixture routing from a checked-in fixture through an adapter-owned runner into observed-packet evaluation.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI tests showing evaluate fixture routes dev/repo and dev/skill fixture inputs through adapter-owned runner templates, writes observed packets, and evaluates those packets into summaries; a direct run of the checked-in dev/skill fixture produced eval-cases, eval-observed, and eval-summary packets; the current command catalog exposes `cautilus evaluate fixture [args]`.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep evaluate-fixture path proof separate from adjacent proof-metadata, runner-selection, and evaluate-observation no-runner claims.
